ENFP - Engineering, Fire Protection

ENFP101 Introduction to Fire Protection Engineering (1 Credit)

This course will introduce students to the impact of fire on people, property and the environment and methods to mitigate the threat of fire. Student teams will apply the principles of fire behavior and fire safety systems covered in the first half of the course to design, build and test a fire safe, small-scale apartment. A final experiment will be conducted to provide an assessment of the complete designs of each team. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fire Protection Engineering department. Credit Only Granted for. ENFP108 or ENFP101.
